subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Ahmad, who hath attained and whose deeds find acceptance with God! The entire world beareth witness to that which, in this Tablet, hath flowed from the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب احمد فائز و عملش لدی الله مقبول جمیع عالم بشهادتیکه در این لوح از قلم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @soul; spirit after death, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
